Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of Solvanta Circular Ltd by Novaplast SE (EU issuer listed on the Regulated Market of Aurora Exchange).
Parties: Novaplast SE (Societas Europaea, Commercial Register HRB 932184 Neubergh; VAT D E 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9) and Solvanta Circular Ltd (Companies Register No. IE912345; EORI IE9A12345B; LEI 529900N0VA0PLAST0002).
Consideration: EUR 142,000,000 (60% cash; 40% new Novaplast SE shares admitted to trading on Aurora Exchange RM); completion targeted for Q4 2026, subject to approvals.
Funding & settlement: Escrow at Aurora Bank EU S.A.; IBAN: XX93 NOVA 1234 5678 9012 34; BIC: NOVAXX22; note—IBAN DE00 0000 0000 0000 0000 00 (checksum invalid) is a specimen only.
Deal contacts (restricted): Dr. Eliza Novak (Chief Executive Officer) — eliza.novak@novaplast.example — Tel. +49 30 9021 4455; public enquiries line +00 800 111 222 333 (switchboard, public).
Data protection & cross-border transfer: diligence may include limited Art. 9 GDPR data (e.g., anonymised health/works-council items); any transfer to the non‑EU data room in Helveticia will rely on EU SCCs and encryption; DPO: dpo@novaplast.example.
KYC: authorised signatory Mr. Tomás Riedl (Austrian passport no. AT9N7X3Q) for Novaplast SE; witness Ms. Leena Østvik (passport FI X1Z2Y3W4); no biometric templates will be collected.
EU MAR inside information: precise non‑public items include unaudited H1 EBIT margin 14.9% and pipeline conversion assumptions; disclosure planned pre‑opening T+3 on Aurora Exchange RM.
MAR workflows: insider list to be created within 24h of access; PDMR closed period will run from quarter‑end to results publication; the CFO to pre‑clear any dealings; role‑only names “the DPO” and “the Company Secretary” appear in internal logs.
Sustainability: the transaction supports CSRD roadmap and SFDR PAI reporting; target’s pro forma EU Taxonomy alignment estimated at 38%; no admission of liability is made regarding historic Scope 3 figures.
Dataroom access: https://dataroom.aurorax.example/deal/NVP-SOL-2026?user=dr.eliza%2Bdeal@novaplast.example&token=XX93NOVA12345678901234; backup link h t t p s : / / a x . e x a m p l e / N V P — S O L.
Conditions precedent: Aurora Exchange (RM) clearance, merger control by the Central Union Competition Authority (CUCA), employee information/consultation, and approval of the Solvanta Circular Ltd shareholders.
Notices: billing address on invoices must reference Novaplast SE Tax ID DE123456789 and project code “Project Helix”; generic labels like “Name: ______” or “Passport No.: ______” must not be used on final forms.
Bank & account identifiers (for settlement only): Account Name Novaplast SE Deal Escrow; IBAN X X 9 3 N O V A 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 0 1 2 3 4; SWIFT/BIC N O V A X X 2 2; do not email credentials to group chats.
Public‑source references (benign): product names NovaBond 2.0 and EcoSeal are publicly advertised; per corporate policy, no device MAC addresses are collected in the onboarding portal.
Miscellaneous: this term sheet is non‑binding (save for confidentiality and exclusivity), does not constitute an offer of securities, and placeholders like “ID: 0000-0000-0000” are for draft routing control only.
